title: Slake Ads Launch
description: A punchy 30-second product launch ad with kinetic typography and 3D product reveals, produced for Slake's Commercial announcement.

title: Mettle Builder Ads
description: An animated Motion graphics that breaks down Mettle mobile features using clean iconography and smooth scene transitions.

title: Pizza Ads Promo
description: friendly social promo built for Pizza brands — bold colors, beat-synced cuts, and snappy captions.

title: Slake Cold Iced
description: A premium ads video for Slake cold iced in different flavours, with light streaks and depth, designed as a reusable opener for Slake's video content.

title: EcoDrive Commercial
description: A broadcast-style commercial mixing live-action plates with motion-graphic overlays to highlight EcoDrive's EV range.

title: Lumen UI Animation
description: A UI animation reel showcasing micro-interactions and screen-flow transitions for Lumen's design system.
